about.description: Creative Developer based near [Milan](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Milan){It's a beautiful city}, specializing in **Technical Design** and __Programming__ for video games. Combining programming skills with artistic vision, I like innovative and engaging digital experiences. __Always learning, always building.__
about.description2: Passionate about pushing the boundaries of technology and art, I thrive on challenges that require both technical expertise and creative problem-solving.
